nodes.label: AI as comprehension aid for unfamiliar requests
nodes.grounding_span: I often use AI to help me understand what my employer or a third party is asking for

nodes.label: AI as guide for form filling
nodes.grounding_span: I also often use AI to guide me when filling out a form like an export permit

nodes.label: AI reliability in mathematical calculations
nodes.grounding_span: they sometimes making shocking errors when it comes to mathematical calculations

nodes.label: AI as step-by-step collaborator
nodes.grounding_span: I like to take it step-by-step, to ensure that I understand everything it's doing

nodes.label: AI as time-saver for uninteresting tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I try to get AI to help me complete them more efficiently, so that I'll ideally have more time to do things that more interest me

nodes.label: AI as threat to entry-level jobs
nodes.label_negative: AI as harmless to senior R&D roles
nodes.grounding_span: AI may eventually eliminate entry level positions, but I think there'll always be humans in senior positions

nodes.label: Understanding and clarity
nodes.grounding_span: to ensure that I understand everything it's doing

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: reducing the error by over 100% wasn't possible, physically or mathematically

nodes.label: Learning and skill growth
nodes.grounding_span: It's important to keep one's skills sharp and moreover to grow and learn new skills

nodes.label: Frustration with AI error
nodes.grounding_span: That entire experience was a total waste of my time and deeply frustrating

nodes.label: Cautious adoption after error
nodes.grounding_span: Months based before I tried using a LLM to help me with my job a second time

nodes.label: Strategic use for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I try to get AI to help me complete them more efficiently

nodes.label: Confidence in human senior roles
nodes.grounding_span: I think there'll always be humans in senior positions

nodes.label: Step-by-step probing and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I like to take it step-by-step, to ensure that I understand everything it's doing

nodes.label: Domain-specific trust calibration
nodes.grounding_span: I try to avoid using AI for tasks that I'm completely familiar with
